description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push to main, pull requests, and tag creation. The workflow should have multiple jobs: lint on ubuntu-latest, build on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-12, and windows-latest, and additional jobs for emscripten, address sanitizer (asan), and undefined behavior sanitizer (ubsan) on ubuntu-latest. Each job should set up Python 3.x, check out the repository, and perform specific build and test tasks.
